description_long: This is a modern two-story house set on a spacious green lawn, featuring a large, irregularly shaped swimming pool in the backyard. The house combines flat and gable roof sections, with the main structure showcasing a mix of light-colored walls and stone accents. Large windows and glass doors are prominent, especially on the ground floor, allowing for ample natural light and views of the outdoor space. The property includes a paved driveway lined with palm trees, leading to a garage attached to the side of the house. The backyard is open and expansive, bordered by a fence and dotted with several tall palm trees, creating a resort-like atmosphere. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with a mix of flat and gable roofs, large windows, a backyard pool, and a palm-lined driveway on a spacious green lot.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the backyard with the swimming pool, the rear facade with large windows, and several palm trees behind the house.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side of the house with the garage, the paved driveway, and a row of palm trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the opposite side, featuring the garage entrance, a sunroom or enclosed porch, and the driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the front entryway with stone accents, steps, and a walkway, as well as the open lawn and pool in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a stone accent wall, steps, and a simple modern door with minimal overhang and no porch.
